headline: Lululemon price target lowered by UBS ahead of Q4 report
summary: UBS has lowered its price target on Lululemon Athletica Inc (NASDAQ:LULU) ahead of the company’s fourth quarter earnings, citing expectations for weaker guidance in fiscal 2026, even as investor sentiment toward the Canadian athletic apparel maker has recently improved. headline: Lululemon: The Market Is Pricing Only Americas Weakness, Ignoring A Global Growth Engine
summary: lululemon athletica trades at 12x earnings as markets overprice Americas weakness and miss international growth. See why I rate LULU stock a Buy.
